title: pi-context-cli does not declare @davidorex/pi-project-workflows; --pi-bound meta-resolution fails from a registry install
description: pi-context --pi-bound resolves the meta-package install root via require.resolve('@davidorex/pi-project-workflows/package.json') to run pi install -l <root> and read its bundled skills/*/SKILL.md. pi-context-cli's dependencies are @davidorex/pi-context and typebox only, so the meta-package resolves only via the in-repo workspace symlink, not from a globally or registry-installed CLI.
impact: From a registry or global install, --pi-bound's meta-path resolution and the downstream pi install -l + SKILL.md tool-union glob fail; the capability works only in-repo via the workspace symlink.
canonical_vocabulary: declared dependency for runtime module resolution
proposed_resolution: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
